data.title: Valmet helps Veolia by upgrading biomass plant efficiency in Poland project. Feb 18, 2026. Fluidized Bed Boiler.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Valmet Oyj announced its partnership with Veolia in Poland for the HeatUp! project. The collaboration involves constructing a Heat Recovery Facility at the EC4 combined heat and power plant using a fluidized bed boiler. This initiative aims to enhance energy efficiency and sustainability in the region. The project is set to commence soon and is expected to significantly reduce carbon emissions by up to 30%. Valmet's involvement demonstrates its commitment to advancing environmental initiatives and fostering cleaner energy solutions.

data.title: FDA approves expanded age indication for Staar Surgical's EVO ICL, now for patients aged 21-60, potential market increase of 8 million.
data.description: The U.S. FDA approved an expanded age indication for Staar Surgical Company's EVO ICL, allowing its use for patients aged 21 to 60 years old. This decision could potentially add nearly 8 million refractive patients to the market. The approval comes after the release of three-year clinical trial safety data, further solidifying the long-term safety profile of the EVO ICL. In the U.S., the EVO ICL has become a favored procedure for patients with -8.0 diopters and above, amidst a decline in laser-based procedures. Recent studies show growing patient interest in non-LASIK alternatives, with a shift towards lens-based solutions. In an FDA clinical trial, 629 eyes were monitored for three years, demonstrating strong safety results. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DHT Holdings, Inc. secures $90,000/day one-year charter for VLCC DHT Opal with a global energy firm starting Feb 2026.
data.description: Bermuda-based company DHT Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DHT) revealed a new development on February 18, 2026. They disclosed entering a one-year time charter agreement for their VLCC DHT Opal, constructed in 2012. The deal, set to start in February 2026, entails a daily rate of $90,000. The charter agreement was made with a prominent global energy firm.

data.title: Shentel employees volunteered 572 hours to help charities addressing food and housing insecurity in local communities.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Edinburg, Virginia, Shenandoah Telecommunications Company (Shentel) (Nasdaq: SHEN), a prominent broadband service provider, shared that 114 of its employees dedicated a total of over 572 volunteer hours in the previous year. This initiative aimed to assist charitable organizations tackling food and housing insecurities within the areas where the Company operates. Through this act, Shentel showcases a strong dedication to community welfare, emphasizing the importance of employees being actively involved in the betterment of their localities.

data.title: SHIB may hit $0.000008 amid technical consolidation, RSI at 45.52, bearish MACD momentum signals.
data.description: The Shiba Inu cryptocurrency currently displays a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 45.52 and has a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Analysts believe that if the ongoing consolidation phase sees an upward breakout, SHIB could potentially reach a resistance level of $0.000008.

data.title: Price prediction for SUI: $0.98 currently, aiming for $1.12 rebound despite bearish trend. Bulls need to hold $0.96 support.
data.description: The price of SUI is currently at $0.98 and is showing bearish MACD signals. However, based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rebound towards the $1.12 resistance level if buyers can uphold the $0.96 support area.

data.title: Endava (NYSE: DAVA) expands partnership with Cognition for governed agentic coding.
data.description: Endava, a business transformation group listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DAVA, revealed a substantial growth in its partnership with Cognition today in London.

data.title: Nonprofit Energy Corps aims to tackle global energy poverty with modern energy systems, founded by Toby Rice and Dr. Scott Tinker.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, a non-profit organization led by energy industry experts is addressing a significant global issue of inadequate access to modern energy sources for billions of individuals. Energy Corps, founded by Toby Rice and Dr. Scott Tinker, aims to enhance opportunities, respect, and financial advancement on a global scale by improving energy infrastructures. Through its collaboration of experienced professionals, Energy Corps combines specialized energy knowledge with a focus on global development. The organization is committed to identifying and implementing solutions for ensuring reliable and modern energy access, ultimately contributing to global economic growth.

data.title: WLD price target: $0.42-$0.48 by March 2026, currently $0.39 with neutral RSI signals. Expect potential recovery soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Worldcoin (WLD) is currently priced at $0.39 and is showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) signals. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend with a target range of $0.42 to $0.48 if a crucial resistance level is surpassed. This potential recovery is projected to materialize over the next 4 to 6 weeks.

data.title: Ultumus & 28Stone to launch Atlas, a new ETF & index data platform. A partnership aiming to evolve with client needs.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Ultumus, a prominent firm specializing in ETF and index data, along with workflow solutions, has announced a partnership with 28Stone Consulting. The latter company, renowned for its provision of technology and software consulting services within the financial services sector, will collaborate with Ultumus to enhance their offerings. This collaboration brings together two key players in their respective fields and is poised to bring about significant advancements in the industry.

data.title: McKay Brothers and Quincy Data improve market connectivity between Ontario and US, linking TMX Markham and Equinix TR2.
data.description: High-speed wireless and wired connections have been established to connect TMX Markham and Equinix TR2 with major US trading locations. This development, effective as of February 18, 2026, enhances the accessibility of time-sensitive market data. McKay Brothers, renowned for its rapid connectivity solutions within the financial market, orchestrated this initiative. It benefits cities like Chicago, IL, Oakland, CA, and Toronto, ON by improving the efficiency of trading operations.

data.title: Bioiberica wins Frost & Sullivan's 2025 European New Product Innovation Award for Clinically Validated Native Type II Collagen.
data.description: Bioiberica has been recognized for its science-led innovation, clinical differentiation, and manufacturing excellence in the European innovative collagen market. The announcement was made by Frost & Sullivan on February 18, 2026. This accolade underscores Bioiberica's leadership in the industry in 2025.

data.title: PSI and Association of Accounting Technicians renew partnership for 5 years to support accounting assessments.
data.description: In a demonstration of continued success in delivering large-scale solutions and a mutual dedication to advancement, PSI, a renowned assessment solutions provider, has renewed a five-year contract. The agreement, announced on Feb. 18, 2026, in Olathe, Kansas, and London, underscores the commitment to innovation and maintaining a successful partnership.
